discardedDetails.title: Research recommendations improve coverage but don't prevent
discardedDetails.reason: Fails actionability: the observation that research and invariants serve orthogonal purposes is a truism with no concrete action for downstream agents.

discardedDetails.title: Pre-existing icon errors (xp-lock → xp-diamond) discovered a
discardedDetails.reason: Fails reusability: specific icon class change (xp-lock→xp-diamond) is not generalizable. The accuracy reviewer already catches pre-existing errors by design.

projectedBenefitsForNextRun: Anti-patterns AGG-002 (create-action higher rejection) and AGG-003 (em dash confusion) will reduce create-task attempts from 2.5 to ~2.0 in subsequent runs
Domain insights about hub-page enumeration (CTXDOM-002) and dual-page API pattern (CTXDOM-003) will improve impact mapping coverage from 91% to ~95%+
Style evolutions for callout titles, redirect_from derivation, and page_link identifier verification will reduce formatting rejections
